deep_dive.title: FiCA: Feed-forward instant Gaussian Codec Avatars from a Single Portrait Image
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce FiCA, a Feed-forward, instant Gaussian Codec Avatar generation pipeline that creates lifelike avatars from a single portrait image. Generating a photorealistic and drivable avatar from just a single image is significantly challenging due to the limited visual information available to accurately infer the 3D appearance and geometry of human heads. To address this, we develop a novel system that combines human-centric vision foundation models with a diffusion model. This system is designed to fully exploit partial visual observations to generate lifelike human avatars. Our proposed diffusion model learns a generative mapping from these partial observations to complete and authentic 3D mesh reconstruction. Additionally, we introduce a feed-forward mesh refinement network that enhances the fidelity and identity preservation of the generated avatars, eliminating the need for person-specific test-time optimization. By leveraging a universal prior model that decodes a generated mesh into a set of 3D Gaussians, we generate a photorealistic 3D Gaussian avatar, capable of being driven with novel expressions in real-time. Our experiments demonstrate that the avatars generated by our feed-forward approach faithfully represent diverse identities and surpass the visual quality of avatars produced by recent competing methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: creates lifelike, drivable avatars from a single portrait image, enabling talking head generation from a single image
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 从单张肖像图像生成可驱动的3D化身，实现单图到视频的说话头像生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 从单张肖像图像生成可驱动的3D化身，实现单图到视频的说话头像生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 从单张肖像图像生成可驱动的3D化身，实现单图到视频的说话头像生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FiCA generates photorealistic and drivable 3D avatars from a single portrait image using human-centric vision models and a diffusion model, enabling image-conditioned video generation of talking heads.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: FiCA提出一种前馈即时高斯编解码化身生成流程，仅从单张肖像图像即可创建逼真可驱动的3D化身。通过结合人体视觉基础模型与扩散模型，从部分观测中推断完整3D头部几何与外观。该方法为基于单张图像的说话视频生成提供了基础模块，可进一步结合唇形同步技术实现精准的口型驱动。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: FiCA提出一种前馈即时高斯编解码化身生成流程，仅从单张肖像图像即可创建逼真可驱动的3D化身。通过结合人体视觉基础模型与扩散模型，从部分观测中推断完整3D头部几何与外观。该方法为基于单张图像的说话视频生成提供了基础模块，可进一步结合唇形同步技术实现精准的口型驱动。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Generating a talking head video from a single portrait image with accurate lip sync using WAN model.
